---
title: "Front matter"
---

# Abstract {.unnumbered}

Your dissertation abstract — typically one paragraph, ~250–350 words depending
on institutional convention. Pull from your `dataimago-spec.yaml`'s
`vertical.dissertation.thesis.contribution` field as a starting point.

# Acknowledgments {.unnumbered}

Acknowledgments for your advisor, committee, family, funders. If you have
funding to acknowledge, also fill in your `dataimago-spec.yaml`'s `funding`
section — that field can be used to auto-render this section in a future
iteration.

# Dedication {.unnumbered}

Optional. Remove this section if not used.
